questionBlocks.text: A Glue job is taking longer than expected. Which CloudWatch metric helps identify if the job is I/O bound?

content.questionText: A Glue job is taking longer than expected. Which CloudWatch metric helps identify if the job is I/O bound?

explanationBlocks.text: BytesRead and BytesWritten metrics indicate I/O activity. If these are high while CPU is moderate, the job is likely I/O bound. CPUUtilization shows compute usage. MemoryUtilization shows memory pressure. NumberOfExecutors indicates parallelism but not I/O characteristics.

content.explanationText: BytesRead and BytesWritten metrics indicate I/O activity. If these are high while CPU is moderate, the job is likely I/O bound. CPUUtilization shows compute usage. MemoryUtilization shows memory pressure. NumberOfExecutors indicates parallelism but not I/O characteristics.

questionBlocks.text: Which Redshift feature automatically replicates data to another region for disaster recovery?

content.questionText: Which Redshift feature automatically replicates data to another region for disaster recovery?

explanationBlocks.text: Redshift cross-region snapshot copy automatically copies automated or manual snapshots to a different AWS region. This enables disaster recovery by allowing restoration in the secondary region. Concurrency Scaling adds query capacity. Spectrum queries S3 data. Data sharing shares live data across clusters in the same region.

content.explanationText: Redshift cross-region snapshot copy automatically copies automated or manual snapshots to a different AWS region. This enables disaster recovery by allowing restoration in the secondary region. Concurrency Scaling adds query capacity. Spectrum queries S3 data. Data sharing shares live data across clusters in the same region.

questionBlocks.text: A company needs to encrypt data at rest in S3 with keys that they can rotate on their own schedule. Which option should be used?

content.questionText: A company needs to encrypt data at rest in S3 with keys that they can rotate on their own schedule. Which option should be used?

explanationBlocks.text: AWS KMS customer-managed keys (CMKs) allow you to control key rotation schedules and audit key usage. SSE-S3 uses AWS-managed keys without customer control. S3 Bucket Keys reduce KMS request costs but do not provide key control. Client-side encryption requires application changes.

content.explanationText: AWS KMS customer-managed keys (CMKs) allow you to control key rotation schedules and audit key usage. SSE-S3 uses AWS-managed keys without customer control. S3 Bucket Keys reduce KMS request costs but do not provide key control. Client-side encryption requires application changes.

zh.questionText: 公司需要加密S3中的静态数据，且密钥需能按自身计划轮换。应使用哪个选项？

questionBlocks.text: 公司需要加密S3中的静态数据，且密钥需能按自身计划轮换。应使用哪个选项？

zh.explanationText: AWS KMS客户管理密钥（CMK）允许您控制密钥轮换计划并审计密钥使用情况。SSE-S3使用AWS托管密钥，客户无法控制。S3存储桶密钥可降低KMS请求成本，但不提供密钥控制。客户端加密需要修改应用程序。

questionBlocks.text: Which Redshift distribution style is MOST appropriate for a large fact table that is joined on a date column?

content.questionText: Which Redshift distribution style is MOST appropriate for a large fact table that is joined on a date column?

blocks.text: KEY distribution on the date column

choices.text: KEY distribution on the date column

correctAnswerBlocks.text: KEY distribution on the date column

content.correctAnswerText: KEY distribution on the date column

explanationBlocks.text: KEY distribution on the join column (date) collocates related rows on the same nodes, minimizing data movement during joins. This is ideal for large fact tables joined frequently on specific columns. ALL is for small dimension tables. EVEN distributes round-robin. AUTO may not choose optimally for specific join patterns.

content.explanationText: KEY distribution on the join column (date) collocates related rows on the same nodes, minimizing data movement during joins. This is ideal for large fact tables joined frequently on specific columns. ALL is for small dimension tables. EVEN distributes round-robin. AUTO may not choose optimally for specific join patterns.

zh.explanationText: 在连接列（日期）上的KEY分布将相关行放在同一节点上，最大限度地减少了连接期间的数据移动。这对于经常在特定列上连接的大型事实表来说是理想的。ALL用于小型维度表。EVEN以轮询方式分布。AUTO可能不会为特定的连接模式选择最优方案。

questionBlocks.text: Which approach provides point-in-time recovery for S3 objects?

content.questionText: Which approach provides point-in-time recovery for S3 objects?

blocks.text: S3 Object Lock in governance mode

choices.text: S3 Object Lock in governance mode

explanationBlocks.text: S3 Versioning preserves all versions of objects, enabling restoration of previous versions (point-in-time recovery). Combined with MFA Delete, it protects against accidental deletion. CRR replicates to another region. Object Lock prevents deletion. AWS Backup for S3 backs up to another S3 bucket.

content.explanationText: S3 Versioning preserves all versions of objects, enabling restoration of previous versions (point-in-time recovery). Combined with MFA Delete, it protects against accidental deletion. CRR replicates to another region. Object Lock prevents deletion. AWS Backup for S3 backs up to another S3 bucket.

blocks.text: 治理模式下的S3 Object Lock

zh.explanationText: S3 Versioning 保留对象的所有版本，能够恢复之前的版本（时间点恢复）。结合 MFA Delete，它可防止意外删除。CRR 复制到另一个区域。Object Lock 防止删除。AWS Backup for S3 备份到另一个 S3 存储桶。

explanationBlocks.text: S3 Versioning 保留对象的所有版本，能够恢复之前的版本（时间点恢复）。结合 MFA Delete，它可防止意外删除。CRR 复制到另一个区域。Object Lock 防止删除。AWS Backup for S3 备份到另一个 S3 存储桶。

questionBlocks.text: Which DynamoDB capacity mode is MOST cost-effective for unpredictable, spiky workloads?

content.questionText: Which DynamoDB capacity mode is MOST cost-effective for unpredictable, spiky workloads?

explanationBlocks.text: On-Demand capacity is most cost-effective for unpredictable, spiky workloads because you pay only for actual usage without capacity planning. Provisioned with Auto Scaling works but may have scaling delays. Reserved capacity requires commitment. Dedicated capacity is not a DynamoDB feature.

content.explanationText: On-Demand capacity is most cost-effective for unpredictable, spiky workloads because you pay only for actual usage without capacity planning. questionBlocks.text: A data pipeline must continue operating even if an entire AWS region becomes unavailable. Which architecture meets this requirement?

content.questionText: A data pipeline must continue operating even if an entire AWS region becomes unavailable. Which architecture meets this requirement?

blocks.text: Multi-AZ deployment within a single region

choices.text: Multi-AZ deployment within a single region

explanationBlocks.text: Multi-region architecture with data replication (like DynamoDB Global Tables, cross-region S3 replication, cross-region Redshift snapshots) provides continuity during regional outages. Multi-AZ only protects against AZ failures. Daily backups involve RPO/RTO tradeoffs. Spot instances do not address regional failures.

content.explanationText: Multi-region architecture with data replication (like DynamoDB Global Tables, cross-region S3 replication, cross-region Redshift snapshots) provides continuity during regional outages. Multi-AZ only protects against AZ failures. Daily backups involve RPO/RTO tradeoffs. Spot instances do not address regional failures.

questionBlocks.text: A Kinesis Data Streams application needs to maintain processing state across consumer restarts. Which feature enables this?

content.questionText: A Kinesis Data Streams application needs to maintain processing state across consumer restarts. Which feature enables this?

explanationBlocks.text: The Kinesis Client Library (KCL) provides checkpointing functionality, allowing consumers to save their position in the stream and resume from that point after restarts. Checkpoints are stored in a DynamoDB table. Firehose is for delivery, not state management. Enhanced fan-out improves throughput. Data Analytics is for SQL processing.

content.explanationText: The Kinesis Client Library (KCL) provides checkpointing functionality, allowing consumers to save their position in the stream and resume from that point after restarts. Checkpoints are stored in a DynamoDB table. Firehose is for delivery, not state management. Enhanced fan-out improves throughput. Data Analytics is for SQL processing.

questionBlocks.text: A data engineer needs to store time-series data with efficient retrieval by timestamp ranges. Which service is MOST appropriate?

content.questionText: A data engineer needs to store time-series data with efficient retrieval by timestamp ranges. Which service is MOST appropriate?

explanationBlocks.text: Amazon Timestream is purpose-built for time-series data with optimized storage and query performance for time-range queries. While DynamoDB can handle time-series, Timestream provides better cost-efficiency and query capabilities for this use case. DocumentDB is for JSON documents. Neptune is for graphs.

This prevents resource contention between workloads. Spectrum is for S3 queries. Data sharing is for sharing data across clusters. Resizing changes cluster capacity.

content.explanationText: Automatic Workload Management with queues provides isolation by routing different types of queries to different queues with dedicated resources. questionBlocks.text: A Kinesis Data Streams consumer needs to process records from 20 shards with strict ordering guarantees per partition key. What is the default maximum number of registered consumers that can use enhanced fan-out per stream?

content.questionText: A Kinesis Data Streams consumer needs to process records from 20 shards with strict ordering guarantees per partition key. What is the default maximum number of registered consumers that can use enhanced fan-out per stream?

explanationBlocks.text: By default, Kinesis Data Streams supports up to 20 registered consumers using enhanced fan-out per stream (provisioned and on-demand standard streams); on-demand Advantage mode raises this to 50. Enhanced fan-out gives each registered consumer a dedicated 2 MB/sec read throughput per shard over HTTP/2 push, so consumers do not compete for the shared 2 MB/sec. For more consumers, use standard shared-throughput consumers.

content.explanationText: By default, Kinesis Data Streams supports up to 20 registered consumers using enhanced fan-out per stream (provisioned and on-demand standard streams); on-demand Advantage mode raises this to 50. Enhanced fan-out gives each registered consumer a dedicated 2 MB/sec read throughput per shard over HTTP/2 push, so consumers do not compete for the shared 2 MB/sec. For more consumers, use standard shared-throughput consumers.

zh.questionText: 一个Kinesis Data Streams消费者需要处理来自20个分片的记录，并要求每个分区键严格保证顺序。每个流使用增强型扇出的已注册消费者默认最大数量是多少？

questionBlocks.text: 一个Kinesis Data Streams消费者需要处理来自20个分片的记录，并要求每个分区键严格保证顺序。每个流使用增强型扇出的已注册消费者默认最大数量是多少？

zh.explanationText: 默认情况下，Kinesis Data Streams每个流最多支持20个使用增强型扇出的已注册消费者（预置和按需标准流）；按需高级模式将此限制提升至50。增强型扇出为每个已注册消费者提供每个分片2 MB/秒的专用读取吞吐量（通过HTTP/2推送），因此消费者不会争用共享的2 MB/秒。如需更多消费者，请使用标准共享吞吐量消费者。

questionBlocks.text: What is the maximum retention period for data in Amazon Kinesis Data Streams?

content.questionText: What is the maximum retention period for data in Amazon Kinesis Data Streams?

explanationBlocks.text: Kinesis Data Streams supports a maximum retention period of 365 days (1 year). The default is 24 hours, but you can increase it to 7 days or up to 365 days for an additional charge. This long-term retention enables replay of historical data for new applications or reprocessing after bug fixes.

content.explanationText: Kinesis Data Streams supports a maximum retention period of 365 days (1 year). The default is 24 hours, but you can increase it to 7 days or up to 365 days for an additional charge. This long-term retention enables replay of historical data for new applications or reprocessing after bug fixes.

questionBlocks.text: Which CloudWatch feature creates alarms based on anomaly detection using machine learning?

content.questionText: Which CloudWatch feature creates alarms based on anomaly detection using machine learning?

explanationBlocks.text: CloudWatch Anomaly Detection uses machine learning to model expected metric behavior and creates alarms when metrics deviate from the expected range. This is useful for detecting unusual patterns. Logs Insights queries logs. Dashboards visualize metrics. Synthetics monitors endpoints.

content.explanationText: CloudWatch Anomaly Detection uses machine learning to model expected metric behavior and creates alarms when metrics deviate from the expected range. This is useful for detecting unusual patterns. Logs Insights queries logs. Dashboards visualize metrics. Synthetics monitors endpoints.

questionBlocks.text: Which S3 feature enforces retention policies that prevent object deletion even by the root account?

blocks.text: S3 Object Lock in compliance mode

choices.text: S3 Object Lock in compliance mode

correctAnswerBlocks.text: S3 Object Lock in compliance mode

content.correctAnswerText: S3 Object Lock in compliance mode

explanationBlocks.text: S3 Object Lock in compliance mode enforces retention policies that cannot be overridden, even by the root account, until the retention period expires. This is required for regulatory compliance. Versioning preserves history but can be disabled. Bucket policies and MFA Delete can be changed by root.

content.explanationText: S3 Object Lock in compliance mode enforces retention policies that cannot be overridden, even by the root account, until the retention period expires. This is required for regulatory compliance. Versioning preserves history but can be disabled. Bucket policies and MFA Delete can be changed by root.

questionBlocks.text: A Kinesis consumer is repeatedly processing the same records. What is the MOST likely cause?

content.questionText: A Kinesis consumer is repeatedly processing the same records. What is the MOST likely cause?

blocks.text: There are too many shards in the stream

choices.text: There are too many shards in the stream

blocks.text: The consumer is not checkpointing progress

choices.text: The consumer is not checkpointing progress

blocks.text: The retention period is too short

choices.text: The retention period is too short

correctAnswerBlocks.text: The consumer is not checkpointing progress

content.correctAnswerText: The consumer is not checkpointing progress

explanationBlocks.text: If a consumer does not checkpoint progress (using the KCL checkpoint method), it will reprocess records from the last checkpoint on restart. Short retention causes data loss, not reprocessing. Shard count and enhanced fan-out do not cause reprocessing.

content.explanationText: If a consumer does not checkpoint progress (using the KCL checkpoint method), it will reprocess records from the last checkpoint on restart. Short retention causes data loss, not reprocessing. Shard count and enhanced fan-out do not cause reprocessing.

zh.correctAnswerText: 消费者未对进度进行检查点记录

correctAnswerBlocks.text: 消费者未对进度进行检查点记录

zh.explanationText: 如果消费者未对进度进行检查点记录（使用 KCL 检查点方法），则重启时会从上一个检查点重新处理记录。保留期短会导致数据丢失，而非重新处理。分片数量和 Enhanced Fan-out 不会导致重新处理。

explanationBlocks.text: 如果消费者未对进度进行检查点记录（使用 KCL 检查点方法），则重启时会从上一个检查点重新处理记录。保留期短会导致数据丢失，而非重新处理。分片数量和 Enhanced Fan-out 不会导致重新处理。

questionBlocks.text: What is the maximum data retention period for Amazon MSK?

content.questionText: What is the maximum data retention period for Amazon MSK?

explanationBlocks.text: Amazon MSK retention is based on storage capacity and configured retention policies, not a fixed time limit. You can configure retention by time (up to effectively unlimited with sufficient storage) or by size. MSK Serverless has different limits.

content.explanationText: Amazon MSK retention is based on storage capacity and configured retention policies, not a fixed time limit. You can configure retention by time (up to effectively unlimited with sufficient storage) or by size. MSK Serverless has different limits.

explanationBlocks.text: Amazon MSK 的保留基于存储容量和配置的保留策略，而非固定时间限制。您可以按时间（在有足够存储的情况下实际上限无限）或按大小配置保留。MSK Serverless 有不同的限制。

questionBlocks.text: Which file size is generally RECOMMENDED for Parquet files in S3 for optimal Athena performance?

content.questionText: Which file size is generally RECOMMENDED for Parquet files in S3 for optimal Athena performance?

explanationBlocks.text: Parquet files between 128 MB and 1 GB are generally optimal for Athena. Files too small (small files problem) cause excessive overhead. Files too large reduce parallelism for query processing. This range balances parallelism and per-file overhead.

content.explanationText: Parquet files between 128 MB and 1 GB are generally optimal for Athena. Files too small (small files problem) cause excessive overhead. Files too large reduce parallelism for query processing. This range balances parallelism and per-file overhead.

questionBlocks.text: 对于 S3 中的 Parquet 文件，为了获得最佳的 Athena 性能，通常推荐的文件大小是多少？

zh.explanationText: Parquet文件大小在128 MB到1 GB之间通常对Athena查询性能最佳。文件过小（小文件问题）会导致过多的开销。文件过大则会降低查询处理的并行度。这个范围在并行度和单文件开销之间取得了平衡。

questionBlocks.text: Which Athena query optimization technique reduces the amount of data scanned?

content.questionText: Which Athena query optimization technique reduces the amount of data scanned?

blocks.text: Partition data and filter on partition columns

choices.text: Partition data and filter on partition columns

correctAnswerBlocks.text: Partition data and filter on partition columns

content.correctAnswerText: Partition data and filter on partition columns

explanationBlocks.text: Partitioning data and filtering on partition columns allows Athena to skip entire partitions (partition pruning), significantly reducing data scanned. SELECT * scans all columns. ORDER BY without LIMIT processes all data. Uncompressed JSON results in more data scanned than columnar formats.

content.explanationText: Partitioning data and filtering on partition columns allows Athena to skip entire partitions (partition pruning), significantly reducing data scanned. SELECT * scans all columns. ORDER BY without LIMIT processes all data. Uncompressed JSON results in more data scanned than columnar formats.

questionBlocks.text: Which DynamoDB feature provides automatic multi-region replication with conflict resolution?

content.questionText: Which DynamoDB feature provides automatic multi-region replication with conflict resolution?

explanationBlocks.text: DynamoDB Global Tables provide automatic multi-region replication with last-write-wins conflict resolution. Writes in any region are replicated to others. Streams capture changes but do not replicate. DAX is for caching. On-Demand is a capacity mode.

content.explanationText: DynamoDB Global Tables provide automatic multi-region replication with last-write-wins conflict resolution. Writes in any region are replicated to others. Streams capture changes but do not replicate. DAX is for caching. On-Demand is a capacity mode.

zh.explanationText: DynamoDB Global Tables提供自动多区域复制，并采用最后写入者获胜的冲突解决机制。任何区域的写入都会被复制到其他区域。Streams捕获变更但不进行复制。DAX用于缓存。On-Demand是一种容量模式。

explanationBlocks.text: DynamoDB Global Tables提供自动多区域复制，并采用最后写入者获胜的冲突解决机制。任何区域的写入都会被复制到其他区域。Streams捕获变更但不进行复制。DAX用于缓存。On-Demand是一种容量模式。

questionBlocks.text: Which file format typically provides the best query performance in Amazon Athena for large datasets?

content.questionText: Which file format typically provides the best query performance in Amazon Athena for large datasets?

explanationBlocks.text: Parquet is a columnar storage format that provides excellent query performance in Athena because it allows column pruning and predicate pushdown, reducing the amount of data scanned. JSON and CSV are row-based and less efficient. XML is generally not recommended for data lakes.

content.explanationText: Parquet is a columnar storage format that provides excellent query performance in Athena because it allows column pruning and predicate pushdown, reducing the amount of data scanned. JSON and CSV are row-based and less efficient. XML is generally not recommended for data lakes.

questionBlocks.text: Which Glue feature helps prevent processing the same data multiple times during incremental loads?

content.questionText: Which Glue feature helps prevent processing the same data multiple times during incremental loads?

explanationBlocks.text: Glue job bookmarks track processed data and enable incremental processing by resuming from the last checkpoint. This prevents reprocessing the same data. Crawlers update the catalog. Catalog indexes improve query performance. Studio version control tracks job versions.

content.explanationText: Glue job bookmarks track processed data and enable incremental processing by resuming from the last checkpoint. This prevents reprocessing the same data. Crawlers update the catalog. Catalog indexes improve query performance. Studio version control tracks job versions.

questionBlocks.text: What is the maximum execution timeout for an AWS Lambda function?

content.questionText: What is the maximum execution timeout for an AWS Lambda function?

explanationBlocks.text: AWS Lambda functions have a maximum execution timeout of 15 minutes (900 seconds). This limit is important for data engineering tasks because long-running ETL processes may exceed this and require alternative services like Glue, EMR, or ECS/Fargate.

content.explanationText: AWS Lambda functions have a maximum execution timeout of 15 minutes (900 seconds). This limit is important for data engineering tasks because long-running ETL processes may exceed this and require alternative services like Glue, EMR, or ECS/Fargate.

zh.questionText: AWS Lambda函数的最大执行超时时间是多少？

questionBlocks.text: AWS Lambda函数的最大执行超时时间是多少？

zh.explanationText: AWS Lambda函数的最大执行超时时间为15分钟（900秒）。这个限制对数据工程任务很重要，因为长时间运行的ETL过程可能超过此限制，需要使用替代服务，如Glue、EMR或ECS/Fargate。

explanationBlocks.text: AWS Lambda函数的最大执行超时时间为15分钟（900秒）。这个限制对数据工程任务很重要，因为长时间运行的ETL过程可能超过此限制，需要使用替代服务，如Glue、EMR或ECS/Fargate。

questionBlocks.text: Which approach ensures data consistency when a multi-step ETL workflow fails halfway through?

content.questionText: Which approach ensures data consistency when a multi-step ETL workflow fails halfway through?

explanationBlocks.text: Idempotent operations (producing the same result when run multiple times) combined with transaction support ensure consistency when workflows fail and restart. This allows safe retry without data duplication or corruption. S3 and DynamoDB consistency models do not address workflow-level consistency.

content.explanationText: Idempotent operations (producing the same result when run multiple times) combined with transaction support ensure consistency when workflows fail and restart. This allows safe retry without data duplication or corruption. S3 and DynamoDB consistency models do not address workflow-level consistency.

zh.questionText: 当多步骤ETL工作流中途失败时，哪种方法能确保数据一致性？

questionBlocks.text: 当多步骤ETL工作流中途失败时，哪种方法能确保数据一致性？

choices.text: 删除所有数据并重新启动

blocks.text: 删除所有数据并重新启动

zh.explanationText: 幂等操作（多次运行产生相同结果）结合事务支持，在工作流失败并重新启动时确保一致性。这允许安全重试，而不会造成数据重复或损坏。S3和DynamoDB的一致性模型无法解决工作流级别的一致性。

explanationBlocks.text: 幂等操作（多次运行产生相同结果）结合事务支持，在工作流失败并重新启动时确保一致性。这允许安全重试，而不会造成数据重复或损坏。S3和DynamoDB的一致性模型无法解决工作流级别的一致性。

questionBlocks.text: Which configuration provides the HIGHEST level of availability for an Amazon EMR cluster?

content.questionText: Which configuration provides the HIGHEST level of availability for an Amazon EMR cluster?

blocks.text: Single master node with on-demand instances

choices.text: Single master node with on-demand instances

blocks.text: Task nodes only with no master

choices.text: Task nodes only with no master

blocks.text: Single master node with spot instances

choices.text: Single master node with spot instances

explanationBlocks.text: EMR with multiple master nodes provides high availability by running redundant master nodes across different Availability Zones. If one master fails, another takes over. Single master configurations have a single point of failure. Task nodes cannot function without a master.

content.explanationText: EMR with multiple master nodes provides high availability by running redundant master nodes across different Availability Zones. If one master fails, another takes over. Single master configurations have a single point of failure. Task nodes cannot function without a master.

content.questionText: Which CloudWatch Logs Insights query function extracts values from JSON log fields?

explanationBlocks.text: The parse command in CloudWatch Logs Insights extracts values from log fields using pattern matching. It can parse JSON, CSV, and other formats. stats performs aggregations. fields selects fields. filter restricts results.

questionBlocks.text: Which S3 storage class transition is NOT allowed by S3 Lifecycle policies?

content.questionText: Which S3 storage class transition is NOT allowed by S3 Lifecycle policies?

blocks.text: S3 Standard to S3 Glacier Deep Archive

choices.text: S3 Standard to S3 Glacier Deep Archive

blocks.text: S3 Standard-IA to S3 One Zone-IA

choices.text: S3 Standard-IA to S3 One Zone-IA

explanationBlocks.text: S3 Glacier and Glacier Deep Archive are archive tiers that cannot be transitioned back to real-time access tiers (Standard, Standard-IA, One Zone-IA) via Lifecycle policies. Data must be restored first. Upward transitions to archive are allowed.

content.explanationText: S3 Glacier and Glacier Deep Archive are archive tiers that cannot be transitioned back to real-time access tiers (Standard, Standard-IA, One Zone-IA) via Lifecycle policies. Data must be restored first. Upward transitions to archive are allowed.

zh.questionText: S3生命周期策略不允许哪种S3存储类转换？

questionBlocks.text: S3生命周期策略不允许哪种S3存储类转换？

zh.explanationText: S3 Glacier和Glacier Deep Archive是归档层，无法通过生命周期策略转换回实时访问层（Standard、Standard-IA、One Zone-IA）。必须先恢复数据。向上转换到归档层是允许的。

explanationBlocks.text: S3 Glacier和Glacier Deep Archive是归档层，无法通过生命周期策略转换回实时访问层（Standard、Standard-IA、One Zone-IA）。必须先恢复数据。向上转换到归档层是允许的。

questionBlocks.text: Which Lake Formation feature provides fine-grained access control at the column level?

content.questionText: Which Lake Formation feature provides fine-grained access control at the column level?

explanationBlocks.text: Lake Formation column-level permissions allow granting SELECT access to specific columns while restricting others. This enables fine-grained access control for sensitive data. Tag-based control uses metadata tags. Row-level security filters rows. Data location permissions control data locations.

content.explanationText: Lake Formation column-level permissions allow granting SELECT access to specific columns while restricting others. This enables fine-grained access control for sensitive data. Tag-based control uses metadata tags. Row-level security filters rows. Data location permissions control data locations.

zh.questionText: 哪个Lake Formation功能提供列级的细粒度访问控制？

questionBlocks.text: 哪个Lake Formation功能提供列级的细粒度访问控制？

zh.explanationText: Lake Formation 列级权限允许授予对特定列的 SELECT 访问权限，同时限制其他列。这实现了对敏感数据的细粒度访问控制。基于标签的控制使用元数据标签。行级安全过滤行。数据位置权限控制数据位置。

explanationBlocks.text: Lake Formation 列级权限允许授予对特定列的 SELECT 访问权限，同时限制其他列。这实现了对敏感数据的细粒度访问控制。基于标签的控制使用元数据标签。行级安全过滤行。数据位置权限控制数据位置。

questionBlocks.text: A Redshift query performs a large number of disk-based joins. Which optimization is MOST likely to help?

content.questionText: A Redshift query performs a large number of disk-based joins. Which optimization is MOST likely to help?

blocks.text: Enable automatic WLM with manual tuning

choices.text: Enable automatic WLM with manual tuning

blocks.text: Change distribution keys to enable collocated joins

choices.text: Change distribution keys to enable collocated joins

blocks.text: Use Redshift Spectrum for all joins

choices.text: Use Redshift Spectrum for all joins

blocks.text: Increase the number of nodes in the cluster

choices.text: Increase the number of nodes in the cluster

correctAnswerBlocks.text: Change distribution keys to enable collocated joins

content.correctAnswerText: Change distribution keys to enable collocated joins

explanationBlocks.text: Collocated joins (where matching rows are on the same node) eliminate data redistribution, reducing disk I/O. Proper distribution key selection ensures related data is co-located. Adding nodes helps but does not address the root cause. WLM manages concurrency, not join performance. Spectrum is for S3 data, not local joins.

content.explanationText: Collocated joins (where matching rows are on the same node) eliminate data redistribution, reducing disk I/O. Proper distribution key selection ensures related data is co-located. Adding nodes helps but does not address the root cause. WLM manages concurrency, not join performance. Spectrum is for S3 data, not local joins.

questionBlocks.text: Which IAM feature allows granting permissions to AWS services without using long-term credentials?

content.questionText: Which IAM feature allows granting permissions to AWS services without using long-term credentials?

explanationBlocks.text: IAM Roles allow you to delegate permissions to AWS services (like Lambda, EC2, Glue) without embedding long-term credentials. Services assume the role and receive temporary credentials. Access keys are long-term credentials. Groups organize users. Password policies enforce password rules.

content.explanationText: IAM Roles allow you to delegate permissions to AWS services (like Lambda, EC2, Glue) without embedding long-term credentials. Services assume the role and receive temporary credentials. Access keys are long-term credentials. Groups organize users. Password policies enforce password rules.

content.questionText: Which AWS Glue feature allows ETL jobs to run on data stored in multiple regions?

blocks.text: Glue ETL with cross-region VPC peering

choices.text: Glue ETL with cross-region VPC peering

correctAnswerBlocks.text: Glue ETL with cross-region VPC peering

content.correctAnswerText: Glue ETL with cross-region VPC peering

explanationBlocks.text: AWS Glue ETL jobs can access data in other regions using cross-region VPC peering or by connecting to data sources via their public endpoints. The Data Catalog is regional. Studio is for authoring jobs. DataBrew is for data preparation, not cross-region ETL.

content.explanationText: AWS Glue ETL jobs can access data in other regions using cross-region VPC peering or by connecting to data sources via their public endpoints. The Data Catalog is regional. Studio is for authoring jobs. DataBrew is for data preparation, not cross-region ETL.

questionBlocks.text: A data engineer needs to grant SELECT permission on specific columns of a table to a group of analysts. Which Lake Formation feature enables this?

content.questionText: A data engineer needs to grant SELECT permission on specific columns of a table to a group of analysts. Which Lake Formation feature enables this?

explanationBlocks.text: Lake Formation supports column-level security, allowing you to grant permissions on specific columns while restricting access to others. This is important for protecting sensitive data like PII. Row-level security controls access to specific rows. Table and database-level permissions are broader.

content.explanationText: Lake Formation supports column-level security, allowing you to grant permissions on specific columns while restricting access to others. This is important for protecting sensitive data like PII. Row-level security controls access to specific rows. Table and database-level permissions are broader.

zh.explanationText: Lake Formation 支持列级安全，允许授予对特定列的权限，同时限制对其他列的访问。这对于保护敏感数据（如个人身份信息）很重要。行级安全控制对特定行的访问。表级和数据库级权限更为广泛。

questionBlocks.text: Which distribution style in Amazon Redshift is MOST appropriate for small dimension tables that are frequently joined with large fact tables?

content.questionText: Which distribution style in Amazon Redshift is MOST appropriate for small dimension tables that are frequently joined with large fact tables?

explanationBlocks.text: ALL distribution copies the entire table to all compute nodes, making it ideal for small dimension tables (typically under 3 million rows). This eliminates data movement during joins with fact tables. KEY distributes by a column. EVEN distributes round-robin. AUTO lets Redshift choose but may not always select ALL for small tables.

content.explanationText: ALL distribution copies the entire table to all compute nodes, making it ideal for small dimension tables (typically under 3 million rows). This eliminates data movement during joins with fact tables. KEY distributes by a column. EVEN distributes round-robin. AUTO lets Redshift choose but may not always select ALL for small tables.

zh.questionText: 在 Amazon Redshift 中，哪种分布样式最适合经常与大型事实表连接的小型维度表？

questionBlocks.text: 在 Amazon Redshift 中，哪种分布样式最适合经常与大型事实表连接的小型维度表？

zh.explanationText: ALL 分布将整个表复制到所有计算节点，非常适合小型维度表（通常少于 300 万行）。这消除了与事实表连接时的数据移动。键分布按列分布。EVEN 分布是轮询分配。AUTO 让 Redshift 选择，但可能不会始终为小表选择 ALL。

explanationBlocks.text: ALL 分布将整个表复制到所有计算节点，非常适合小型维度表（通常少于 300 万行）。这消除了与事实表连接时的数据移动。键分布按列分布。EVEN 分布是轮询分配。AUTO 让 Redshift 选择，但可能不会始终为小表选择 ALL。

questionBlocks.text: Which CloudWatch metric indicates that a Kinesis consumer is falling behind in processing?

content.questionText: Which CloudWatch metric indicates that a Kinesis consumer is falling behind in processing?

explanationBlocks.text: GetRecords.IteratorAgeMilliseconds measures the age of the last record processed, indicating how far behind a consumer is. High values mean the consumer cannot keep up with the data ingestion rate. Incoming metrics show data volume. WriteProvisionedThroughputExceeded indicates write capacity issues.

content.explanationText: GetRecords.IteratorAgeMilliseconds measures the age of the last record processed, indicating how far behind a consumer is. High values mean the consumer cannot keep up with the data ingestion rate. Incoming metrics show data volume. WriteProvisionedThroughputExceeded indicates write capacity issues.

zh.questionText: 哪个 CloudWatch 指标表明 Kinesis 消费者在处理中落后？

questionBlocks.text: 哪个 CloudWatch 指标表明 Kinesis 消费者在处理中落后？

zh.explanationText: GetRecords.IteratorAgeMilliseconds 测量最后处理记录的时间，指示消费者落后了多少。高值意味着消费者无法跟上数据摄取速率。传入指标显示数据量。WriteProvisionedThroughputExceeded 表示写入容量问题。

explanationBlocks.text: GetRecords.IteratorAgeMilliseconds 测量最后处理记录的时间，指示消费者落后了多少。高值意味着消费者无法跟上数据摄取速率。传入指标显示数据量。WriteProvisionedThroughputExceeded 表示写入容量问题。

questionBlocks.text: A data engineer needs to validate incoming data for schema compliance and data quality rules before loading to the data warehouse. Which AWS service provides built-in data quality capabilities?

content.questionText: A data engineer needs to validate incoming data for schema compliance and data quality rules before loading to the data warehouse. Which AWS service provides built-in data quality capabilities?

explanationBlocks.text: AWS Glue DataBrew provides visual data preparation with built-in data quality checks including schema validation, data profiling, and rule-based quality assessments. Athena is for querying, not data quality. Redshift Spectrum extends queries to S3. CloudTrail is for audit logging, not data quality.

content.explanationText: AWS Glue DataBrew provides visual data preparation with built-in data quality checks including schema validation, data profiling, and rule-based quality assessments. Athena is for querying, not data quality. Redshift Spectrum extends queries to S3. CloudTrail is for audit logging, not data quality.

questionBlocks.text: Which approach is BEST for enforcing that all S3 buckets in an organization have encryption enabled?

content.questionText: Which approach is BEST for enforcing that all S3 buckets in an organization have encryption enabled?

blocks.text: Enable CloudTrail for all S3 API calls

choices.text: Enable CloudTrail for all S3 API calls

explanationBlocks.text: AWS Config rule s3-bucket-server-side-encryption-enabled continuously checks that S3 buckets have encryption enabled and marks non-compliant buckets. This can be combined with remediation actions. CloudWatch Alarms monitor metrics. Block Public Access controls public access. CloudTrail logs activity but does not enforce.

content.explanationText: AWS Config rule s3-bucket-server-side-encryption-enabled continuously checks that S3 buckets have encryption enabled and marks non-compliant buckets. This can be combined with remediation actions. CloudWatch Alarms monitor metrics. Block Public Access controls public access. CloudTrail logs activity but does not enforce.
